title: Warframe: The Old Place
description: Sculpted a desolate alien landscape through a hybrid manual and procedural workflow — terrain shaping, rock scattering, and silhouette composition tuned for cinematic gameplay framing.
description_zh: 通过手工与程序化结合的工作流，雕刻出荒芜的外星地貌 —— 地形塑形、岩石散布与剪影构图均为电影化的游戏视角而调校。

title: Fantasy World
description: Hand-drawn fantasy environment series produced through a custom ComfyUI pipeline with LoRA fine-tuning for a consistent illustrative style.
description_zh: 手绘风格奇幻场景系列，通过自定义 ComfyUI 管线与 LoRA 微调，呈现统一的插画化视觉风格。

title: The Secret of the Raven Tavern
description: Cinematic short driven by GPT Image-2, Seedance 2.0, and LiblibTV — an end-to-end AIGC pipeline delivering high-fidelity video at production speed.
description_zh: 由 GPT Image-2、Seedance 2.0 与 LiblibTV 驱动的电影化短片 —— 端到端 AIGC 管线，以制作级速度输出高保真视频。

title: Sci-Fi Trim Sheet
description: Tileable sci-fi trim sheet authored in Substance 3D Designer — fully parametric and optimized for modular hard-surface kit-bashing.
description_zh: 在 Substance 3D Designer 中创作的可平铺科幻 Trim Sheet —— 完全参数化，专为模块化硬表面拼接而优化。

title: Project WARZONE
description: Fully featured third-person shooter prototype — gunplay, AI, and systemic combat staged inside a war-themed sandbox.
description_zh: 功能完整的第三人称射击原型 —— 枪械手感、AI 与系统化战斗，置于战争主题的沙盒之中。

title: Chainsaw man Mecha
description: Stylized mecha concept series generated through a local ComfyUI pipeline with a custom-trained LoRA driving consistent design language.
description_zh: 风格化机甲概念系列，通过本地 ComfyUI 管线生成，并由自训练 LoRA 驱动统一的设计语言。

title: Sand Rock
description: Procedural desert rock material authored in Substance 3D Designer — fully parametric, art-directable, and validated in Unreal Engine.
description_zh: 在 Substance 3D Designer 中创作的程序化沙漠岩石材质 —— 完全参数化、可艺术化调控，并已在 Unreal Engine 中验证。

title: Desert Outpost
description: Forward operating base level art from DUST 514 — an FPS title set within the EVE Online universe.
description_zh: 来自 DUST 514 的前进作战基地关卡美术 —— 一款设定于 EVE Online 宇宙的 FPS 游戏。

title: The Last Battle
description: Key art moment — a Caldari HAV poised at the brink of the final engagement within the EVE universe.
description_zh: 关键视觉时刻 —— 一辆卡尔达里 HAV 在 EVE 宇宙的最终决战临界点上蓄势待发。

title: Project : Blood Message
description: Unreal Engine 5 cinematic — owned the full pipeline from Gaea 2 terrain generation through scene construction and Sequencer-driven cutscenes.
description_zh: 虚幻引擎 5 电影化短片 —— 全流程独立负责，从 Gaea 2 地形生成到场景搭建与 Sequencer 驱动的过场动画。

title: Heavy Mecha
description: Heavy mecha concept rendered through a local ComfyUI pipeline with prompt-engineered silhouette and material control.
description_zh: 重型机甲概念，通过本地 ComfyUI 管线渲染，结合提示词工程驱动的剪影与材质控制。

title: Warframe: Cycle of Hell
description: Warframe level art — sole ownership from greybox blockout through final shipping polish, including layout, set dressing, and lighting pass.
description_zh: Warframe 关卡美术 —— 独立负责从灰盒蓝图到最终出货打磨的全过程，包括布局、置景与灯光 pass。

title: Warframe: 1999
description: Warframe: 1999 level art — drove the environment from greybox to final, handling layout, set dressing, and visual polish at shipping quality.
description_zh: Warframe: 1999 关卡美术 —— 从灰盒到最终成品全程主导环境制作，负责布局、置景与视觉打磨，达到出货品质。

title: Dead Space - Ship Interior
title_zh: 死亡空间 —— 飞船内部
description: Concept series exploring sci-fi spaceship interiors in the spirit of Dead Space — atmosphere and material studies generated with Midjourney.
description_zh: 以《死亡空间》气质为灵感的科幻飞船内部概念系列 —— 由 Midjourney 生成的氛围与材质研究。

title: Gemstone
description: Amethyst — collectible asset rendered for an NFT gemstone series, tuned for refraction and dispersion fidelity.
description_zh: 紫水晶 —— 为 NFT 宝石系列渲染的收藏品资产，针对折射与色散保真度调校。

title: Gemstone
description: Quartz — collectible asset rendered for an NFT gemstone series, tuned for refraction and dispersion fidelity.
description_zh: 石英 —— 为 NFT 宝石系列渲染的收藏品资产，针对折射与色散保真度调校。

title: Gemstone
description: Emerald — collectible asset rendered for an NFT gemstone series, tuned for refraction and dispersion fidelity.
description_zh: 祖母绿 —— 为 NFT 宝石系列渲染的收藏品资产，针对折射与色散保真度调校。

title: Cyberpunk World
description: Cyberpunk environment study — illustrative key frame generated via a custom LoRA on a local ComfyUI workflow.
description_zh: 赛博朋克场景研究 —— 通过本地 ComfyUI 工作流上的自定义 LoRA 生成的插画化关键画面。

title: Cyberpunk World
description: Cyberpunk environment study — illustrative key frame generated via a custom LoRA on a local ComfyUI workflow.
description_zh: 赛博朋克场景研究 —— 通过本地 ComfyUI 工作流上的自定义 LoRA 生成的插画化关键画面。

title: Lava Planet Mining District
description: Base terrain authored as a Gaea heightmap, imported to UE5 for landscape generation, with landscape splines driving the molten lava flow. Layout, lighting, and post pass finished in-engine.
description_zh: 基础地形由 Gaea 高度图制作，导入 UE5 进行地貌生成，并以 Landscape Spline 驱动熔岩流动。布局、灯光与后期均在引擎内完成。

title: Cyberpunk Girl
description: Cyberpunk character study generated through a local ComfyUI pipeline.
description_zh: 通过本地 ComfyUI 管线生成的赛博朋克角色研究。

title: Cyberpunk Girl
description: Cyberpunk character study generated through a local ComfyUI pipeline.
description_zh: 通过本地 ComfyUI 管线生成的赛博朋克角色研究。

title: Cyberpunk Girld
description: Cyberpunk character study generated through a local ComfyUI pipeline.
description_zh: 通过本地 ComfyUI 管线生成的赛博朋克角色研究。

title: Hakimi Block Blast!
description: Independently developed and shipped mobile puzzle title — now live on Google Play.
description_zh: 独立开发并已上线的移动端益智游戏 —— 现已登陆 Google Play 商店。

title: Stylized Character Design
description: Disney-style 3D character pipeline blending traditional CG craft with AIGC-assisted iteration for rapid look development.
description_zh: 迪士尼风格的 3D 角色管线，融合传统 CG 制作与 AIGC 辅助迭代，实现快速视觉开发。

title: Project : BladeWar
description: Action prototype featuring a combo-driven melee combat system and a fully scripted boss encounter.
description_zh: 动作原型，包含连击驱动的近战战斗系统与一段完整脚本化的 Boss 战。

title: Project WARZONE
description: Stealth gameplay vertical slice from the WARZONE prototype — AI awareness, cover navigation, and tactical pacing.
description_zh: WARZONE 原型中的潜行玩法垂直切片 —— 包含 AI 感知、掩体导航与战术节奏。

title: Off-Road Vehicle
description: Stylized off-road vehicle developed through a hybrid 3D CG and AIGC workflow — concept-to-render in a single iterative loop.
description_zh: 通过 3D CG 与 AIGC 混合工作流开发的风格化越野载具 —— 概念到渲染一气呵成的迭代循环。

title: Sci‑fi Girl Portrait
description: Sci-fi female character portrait crafted through a hybrid CG and AIGC pipeline for cinematic likeness and material fidelity.
description_zh: 通过 CG 与 AIGC 混合管线打造的科幻女性角色肖像，追求电影化的人物相似度与材质保真度。

title: Sci‑fi Male Portrait
description: Sci-fi male character portrait crafted through a hybrid CG and AIGC pipeline for cinematic likeness and material fidelity.
description_zh: 通过 CG 与 AIGC 混合管线打造的科幻男性角色肖像，追求电影化的人物相似度与材质保真度。

title: META CITY
description: Metaverse city built in UE5 — a real-time virtual space designed for immersive VR exploration.
description_zh: 在 UE5 中构建的元宇宙城市 —— 为沉浸式 VR 探索而设计的实时虚拟空间。

title: Alien Base
description: Sci-fi alien base environment built in UE5 — VR-ready level art tuned for metaverse deployment.
description_zh: 在 UE5 中构建的科幻外星基地场景 —— 为元宇宙部署调校的 VR 级关卡美术。

title: Image to Prompt
description: AI-assisted Chrome extension — published on the Chrome Web Store — that converts any image into a descriptive generative prompt.
description_zh: AI 辅助的 Chrome 扩展 —— 已上架 Chrome Web Store —— 可将任何图像转换为描述性的生成式提示词。
